allow: Bash(echo "=== Likely CV/photo locations ==="; find /Users/ti.gao/Documents /Users/ti.gao/Desktop /Users/ti.gao/Downloads -maxdepth 2 \\\( -iname "*cv*" -o -iname "*resume*" -o -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.jpeg" -o -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*headshot*" -o -iname "*photo*" \\\) 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "cv|resume|headshot|photo|\\.jpg|\\.jpeg|\\.png" | head -40)
